description: The grand finale of the BRC Dorahacks Southeast Asian Hackathon features over 40 projects from various countries, including Singapore, Vietnam, and Indonesia. Co-hosted by Eric and Jeff, the event showcases 27 projects with tight schedules for presentations. The hackathon aims to highlight innovative ideas and encourage developers to utilize Binance Merchant's infrastructure.
topic_summary: The final day of the BRC Dorahacks Southeast Asian Hackathon, showcasing 27 projects from multiple countries, co-hosted by Eric and Jeff. The event emphasizes innovation and developer engagement with Binance Merchant.
